scripts.build: npm run build -w @suno/shared && npm run build -w @suno/api && npm run build -w @suno/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @suno/shared && npm run build -w @suno/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @suno/shared && npm run build -w @suno/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @suno/shared && npm run test -w @suno/api && npm run test -w @suno/web
scripts.render:build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:api
